name: compat-adapter
title: Compat-compat Bun adapter
description: Child C (depends on A+B): bundled Bun host child that loads Compat JS/TS plugins, maps Compat Hooks to the yaca protocol, points the SDK client at yaca serve, provides Bun shell, runs .opencode/plugins scan + npm install. Server hooks only; TUI surface excluded.
creator: cydia2001
